texto: Each morning in every family, men, women and children, if they have nothing better to do, tell each other their dreams.We are all at the mercy of the dream and we owe it to ourselves to submit its powers to the waking state.
explicacao: Citação de La Révolution Surréaliste No. 1 sobre temas ligados a familia. “Each morning in every family, men, women and children, if they have nothing better to do, tell ea…” articula familia, dream, reflexao em registro de familia, com relevância para contextos como bom-dia e reflexao.
